name: Light Alfredo Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook onion and garlic clove in vegetable oil over medium heat until golden.
2. Mix skim milk, chicken broth, flour, salt, and pepper; stir into onion mixture until thickened.
3. Stir in Parmesan cheese.
4. After pasta has cooked 9 minutes, add broccoli to cooking water.
